library-management-oop.overview:
Full OOP library system with inheritance, exception handling, and file storage.

Features to build:
• Add Books
• Issue Books
• Return Books
• File Storage

Requirements:
• Use inheritance
• Handle exceptions properly
• Persist data to file

Bonus:
• Search books
• Fine for late returns
library-management-oop.explanation: Library Management System (OOP) is a intermediate-level project (Week 4). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Add Books, Issue Books, Return Books, File Storage.
library-management-oop.githubLabel: Library Management System — Spring Boot + JPA
library-management-oop.youtubeLabel: Library Management System in Java (JSP + Servlet + MySQL)
library-management-oop.studyNote:
1. Watch the YouTube tutorial first.
2. Open the GitHub repo — clone or browse the source.
3. Build your version feature-by-feature in IntelliJ.
4. Test each feature before moving on.
5. Mark complete when your project works end-to-end.

bank-management-system.overview:
Bank system with account operations, exception handling, and transaction persistence.

Features to build:
• Account Creation
• Deposit
• Withdraw
• Exception Handling
• Save Transactions

Requirements:
• Custom exceptions for insufficient funds
• Save transactions to file

Bonus:
• Transaction history report
bank-management-system.explanation: Bank Management System is a intermediate-level project (Week 4). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Account Creation, Deposit, Withdraw, Exception Handling, Save Transactions.

hospital-management.overview:
Patient and doctor management with file-based record storage.

Features to build:
• Patient Registration
• Doctor Details
• Appointment
• Store Records in File

Requirements:
• Use OOP design
• Exception handling for invalid data
• File persistence

Bonus:
• Appointment scheduling conflicts check
hospital-management.explanation: Hospital Management System is a intermediate-level project (Week 4). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Patient Registration, Doctor Details, Appointment, Store Records in File.

employee-payroll.overview:
Employee payroll with department management and file report generation.

Features to build:
• Employee Details
• Salary
• Department
• File Report Generation

Requirements:
• Inheritance for employee types
• Generate payroll report file

Bonus:
• Tax deduction calculation
